mapper.select: SELECT type, SUM(file_size) AS totalTraffic FROM sys_traffic WHERE status = 1 -- 只统计成功的流量 AND DATE(created_at) = DATE(NOW()) -- 筛选今天的数据 (MySQL语法) GROUP BY type

SELECT DATE(created_at) AS statDate, SUM(CASE WHEN type = 1 THEN file_size ELSE 0 END) AS uploadSum, SUM(CASE WHEN type = 2 THEN file_size ELSE 0 END) AS downloadSum FROM sys_traffic WHERE status = 1 AND created_at >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 6 DAY) GROUP BY DATE(created_at) ORDER BY statDate ASC
